name: Alice Nkurunziza
resumeText: Experienced data scientist with 5 years building ML pipelines. Led a team of 3 at a Kigali fintech. Published two papers on NLP. Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, SQL, and Tableau. Delivered churn prediction model saving $200k annually.
